'''rojahaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:yonderly|yonderly]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-j-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yonderly|yonderly]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| rojahaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:rojahithi|rojahithi]] || [[word:rojahiji|rojahiji]] || [[word:rojahishi|rojahishi]] || [[word:rojahiki|rojahiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:rojahuthuthu|rojahuthuthu]] || [[word:rojahujuju|rojahujuju]] || [[word:rojahushushu|rojahushushu]] || [[word:rojahukuku|rojahukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:rojahuthu|rojahuthu]] || [[word:rojahuju|rojahuju]] || [[word:rojahushu|rojahushu]] || [[word:rojahuku|rojahuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:rojahufthuf|rojahufthuf]] || [[word:rojahufjuf|rojahufjuf]] || [[word:rojahufshuf|rojahufshuf]] || [[word:rojahufkuf|rojahufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:rojahethe|rojahethe]] || [[word:rojaheje|rojaheje]] || [[word:rojaheshe|rojaheshe]] || [[word:rojaheke|rojaheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:rojahothotho|rojahothotho]] || [[word:rojahojojo|rojahojojo]] || [[word:rojahoshosho|rojahoshosho]] || [[word:rojahokoko|rojahokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:rojahotho|rojahotho]] || [[word:rojahojo|rojahojo]] || [[word:rojahosho|rojahosho]] || [[word:rojahoko|rojahoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:rojahofthof|rojahofthof]] || [[word:rojahofjof|rojahofjof]] || [[word:rojahofshof|rojahofshof]] || [[word:rojahofkof|rojahofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:rojahÃŸfthÃŸf|rojahÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:rojahÃŸfjÃŸf|rojahÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:rojahÃŸfshÃŸf|rojahÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:rojahÃŸfkÃŸf|rojahÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:rojahÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|rojahÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:rojahÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|rojahÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:rojahÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|rojahÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:rojahÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|rojahÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:rojahÃŸfthÃŸf|rojahÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:rojahÃŸfjÃŸf|rojahÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:rojahÃŸfshÃŸf|rojahÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:rojahÃŸfkÃŸf|rojahÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:rojahÃŸfthÃŸf|rojahÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:rojahÃŸfjÃŸf|rojahÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:rojahÃŸfshÃŸf|rojahÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:rojahÃŸfkÃŸf|rojahÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:rojahÃḊthÃḊ|rojahÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:rojahÃḊjÃḊ|rojahÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:rojahÃḊshÃḊ|rojahÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:rojahÃḊkÃḊ|rojahÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:rojahathatha|rojahathatha]] || [[word:rojahajaja|rojahajaja]] || [[word:rojahashasha|rojahashasha]] || [[word:rojahakaka|rojahakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:rojahatha|rojahatha]] || [[word:rojahaja|rojahaja]] || [[word:rojahasha|rojahasha]] || [[word:rojahaka|rojahaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:rojahafthaf|rojahafthaf]] || [[word:rojahafjaf|rojahafjaf]] || [[word:rojahafshaf|rojahafshaf]] || [[word:rojahafkaf|rojahafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:rojahasha|rojahasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:rojahshÃḋsha|rojahshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:rojahrosha|rojahrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:rojahmusha|rojahmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:rojahyasha|rojahyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorojahnkshÃḋsha|gorojahnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gorojahnkrosha|gorojahnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorojahnkmusha|gorojahnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gorojahnkyasha|gorojahnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:rojajahasha|rojajahasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:rojajahshÃḋsha|rojajahshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:rojajahrosha|rojajahrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:rojajahmusha|rojajahmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:rojajahyasha|rojajahyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorojajahnkshÃḋsha|gorojajahnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gorojajahnkrosha|gorojajahnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorojajahnkmusha|gorojajahnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gorojajahnkyasha|gorojajahnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:rejÃḊhasha|rejÃḊhasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:rejÃḊhshÃḋsha|rejÃḊhshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:rejÃḊhrosha|rejÃḊhrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:rejÃḊhmusha|rejÃḊhmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:rejÃḊhyasha|rejÃḊhyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorejÃḊhnkshÃḋsha|gorejÃḊhnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gorejÃḊhnkrosha|gorejÃḊhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorejÃḊhnkmusha|gorejÃḊhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gorejÃḊhnkyasha|gorejÃḊhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:rojfahasha|rojfahasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:rojfahshÃḋsha|rojfahshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:rojfahrosha|rojfahrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:rojfahmusha|rojfahmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:rojfahyasha|rojfahyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorojfahnkshÃḋsha|gorojfahnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gorojfahnkrosha|gorojfahnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorojfahnkmusha|gorojfahnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gorojfahnkyasha|gorojfahnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d2c7592}}
